_comment: Hermetic memory-retrieval golden set (wave 1sufo / change 1sufm). The runner builds this synthetic corpus in a temp repo; it never depends on the live corpus. Measurement-only: it exercises the current wave_memory_search / brief paths and asserts the policy invariants.

records.summary: Auth session handling is fragile; re-run the full suite after editing it.
Minor logging nit in the auth login session flow.
The build needs the pinned toolchain version; newer breaks codegen.
The build once needed an old dependency pin for a legacy codegen path.
Old API direction: return raw dicts from the endpoint.
New API direction: return typed envelopes from the endpoint.

cases.invariant_note: exact-target lookup returns both; the higher-trust record ranks first
semantic wants the low-trust nit first; the fixed policy keeps the high-trust record on top
no-index text-containment fallback + policy order (higher confidence first)
same base confidence, but the time-decayed old record ranks below the fresh one
the superseded record is excluded from default surfacing
